message:
fix: Add --legacy-peer-deps to resolve typescript-eslint peer dependency conflict

TypeScript 5.9.2 conflicts with typescript-eslint@8.38.0 which requires <5.9.0.
Using --legacy-peer-deps allows npm to proceed with the installation despite
the peer dependency conflict.

This fixes npm ci failures in all workflows.
